name: Secrets Vaulter
description: Reads the isolation-audit contract and designs secrets management for the multi-tenant system. PII SCRUBBING: ALL credential values (API keys, DB passwords, JWT secrets, encryption keys) are scrubbed before reaching the LLM — only key names are analysed. Covers per-tenant secret namespacing in vault, rotation schedules per type, audit log requirements for secret access, and emergency rotation runbook. Secrets found by scan: DB_PASSWORD, JWT_SECRET, ENCRYPTION_KEY, AWS_ACCESS_KEY.

checks.pass: isolation-audit contract available — proceeding with secrets vault design
checks.fail: isolation-audit contract not available — cannot design secrets management without isolation audit

checks.prompt: Design a secrets management plan for the multi-tenant system. IMPORTANT: all credential values have been scrubbed for PII/security compliance — only the following key names are available for analysis (do NOT attempt to recover, infer, or generate actual secret values): DB_PASSWORD, JWT_SECRET, ENCRYPTION_KEY, AWS_ACCESS_KEY. Design: (1) per-tenant secret namespacing in vault — define the path hierarchy (e.g. tenants/{tenantId}/db_password) ensuring complete namespace isolation between tenants and preventing cross-tenant secret access, (2) secret rotation schedule per type: DB passwords monthly with zero-downtime rotation procedure, JWT secrets quarterly with graceful token invalidation, API keys on-demand with immediate rotation capability when compromise is suspected, (3) audit log requirements for all secret access events — log who (service identity), what (secret path), when (timestamp), from where (source IP/service), and outcome, (4) emergency rotation runbook — step-by-step procedure to rotate all secrets for a single tenant in under 15 minutes without disrupting other tenants, including coordination steps for dependent services.
checks.pass: Secrets vault plan designed — namespacing, rotation schedules, audit logging, and emergency runbook documented
checks.fail: Secrets vault plan incomplete or potential secret value exposure detected
